bibliographic_info.title: Retrieval of precipitable water vapor by using BeiDou PPP-B2b signal with an ocean-based experiment

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Available online at www.sciencedirect.com ScienceDirect Advances in Space Research 77(2026)297–309 www.elsevier.com/locate/asr Retrieval of precipitable water vapor by using BeiDou PPP-B2b signal with an ocean-based experiment Haibo Gea,⁎ , Xiaoxue Kea , Zhilu Wua, Peijun Qiaob, Qunhui Yangb,c , Miaomiao Wangd, Bofeng Lia a College of Surveying and Geo-Informatics, TongjiUniversi
The PPP-B2b service provided by the BeiDou navigation satellite system (BDS) becomes a promising way for real-time PWV retrieval.
